signals.headline: Russia Issues Stark Warning Ahead of Iran-US Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Issues Stark Warning Ahead of Iran-US Talks | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Russia warned all parties to act responsibly before Iran-US talks in Islamabad, criticizing Hormuz claims and urging conflict end to stabilize the Gulf.[6] No resolutions confirmed on NATO tensions or Trump threats to Europe/Iran infrastructure.[3][4]

signals.headline: SEC Token Classification Clarity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Token Classification Clarity | YES | HIGH confidence**

The **SEC officially classified BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA and others as digital commodities**[8]. This regulatory clarity removes a major uncertainty factor that prediction markets price in, particularly benefiting XRP's institutional appeal as noted by analysts[3].
